justification: Texas Tribune article explicitly covers Elliston Berry and her mother Anna McAdams as joint advocates whose story led to the Take It Down Act signing.
Pulitzer Center's own page for Karen Hao documents her role as co-creator of the AI Spotlight Series at the Pulitzer Center.
Official Senate HSGAC press release naming both Peters and Braun as co-introducers of bipartisan AI training legislation for federal supervisors.
Senator Peters' official press release on reintroducing the AI and Critical Technology Workforce Framework Act with Sen. Eric Schmitt.
Official Senate HSGAC press release naming both Peters and Tillis as co-introducers of the PREPARED for AI Act on federal AI procurement.
Senate Commerce Committee press release explicitly names both Cantwell and Moran as co-introducers of the NSF AI Education Act of 2026.
Senate Commerce Committee press release explicitly names Cantwell, Young, Hickenlooper, and Blackburn as co-sponsors reintroducing the Future of AI Innovation Act.
Senator Cantwell's official press release documents her joining Senator Booker on the Senate floor to speak against the Trump agenda/budget.
House Science Committee press release names both Lofgren and Lucas as co-introducers of the Workforce for AI Trust Act (H.R. 9215) on July 30, 2024.
Rep. Lieu's official press release announces the House Bipartisan Task Force on AI and names Lieu and Obernolte as Co-Chairs.
Rep. Lieu's official press release names Lieu, Gottheimer, and Foushee as Co-Chairs of the new House Democratic Commission on AI and the Innovation Economy.
Rep. Foushee's official press release explicitly names Foushee and Lieu as co-chairs of the House Democratic Commission on AI and the Innovation Economy.
Sen. Markey's official press release names both Markey and Rep. Clarke as co-leads of the reintroduced AI Civil Rights Act.
Rep. Jayapal's official press release names Jayapal, Markey, Clarke, and Lee as co-introducers of the AI Civil Rights Act, confirming Jayapal's House co-lead role.
Rep. Summer Lee's official press release documents her co-lead role alongside Markey, Clarke, and Jayapal in reintroducing the AI Civil Rights Act.
